s: Use this simple Tasker plugin to enable/disable WaveUp at will.
d: A Tasker plugin to allow to enable and disable WaveUp using Tasker. For the nerdier 😉 This Tasker plugin is based on Termux:Task and is also released under the GPLv3 license. Of course, it's also open source and you can check out the code. @Termux Team: Thank you very much for this cool piece of code! How to use ★ Create a new Tasker Action. ★ In the resulting Select Action Category dialog, select Plugin. ★ In the resulting Action Plugin dialog, select WaveUp. ★ Edit the configuration to specify whether WaveUp should be enabled or disabled.
